---
title: "UpSet Plot and Venn Diagram Generator"
author: "Chu Lab"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date())`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r global-knitr-opts, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = TRUE,
  fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6
)
```

# Overview

Compare DE gene lists across analyses and visualize the overlaps. Two
operating modes:

- **Method 1 (`USE_MULTIPLE_COMPARISONS = TRUE`):** read several `allGenes.xlsx`
  files (one per comparison from `run_differential_expression.Rmd`) and
  intersect their significant-gene sets.
- **Method 2 (`USE_SINGLE_RESULT = TRUE`):** take a single `allGenes.xlsx` and
  split it into categories by fold-change magnitude (High/Moderate Ă— Up/Down).

Each mode produces an UpSet plot (always), a Venn diagram (when there are
2â€“4 lists), an Excel workbook with the per-set gene lists + all pairwise/full
overlaps, and a summary table.

# 1. Parameters

```{r parameters}
ANALYSIS_NAME <- "multi_comparison"
OUTPUT_DIR    <- "figures"

# ---- Method choice (set exactly one to TRUE) ----------------------
USE_MULTIPLE_COMPARISONS <- TRUE   # Method 1
USE_SINGLE_RESULT        <- FALSE  # Method 2

# ---- Method 1 inputs ----------------------------------------------
# Named vector: list name = path to that comparison's allGenes.xlsx
COMPARISON_RESULTS <- c(
  "Comparison1" = "figures/comparison1/allGenes.xlsx",
  "Comparison2" = "figures/comparison2/allGenes.xlsx"
)

# ---- Method 2 inputs ----------------------------------------------
SINGLE_RESULT_FILE <- "figures/my_analysis/allGenes.xlsx"

# ---- Gene filtering (both methods) --------------------------------
DIRECTION       <- "both"  # "up", "down", or "both"
LFC_THRESHOLD   <- 1
PADJ_THRESHOLD  <- 0.05

# ---- Optional pathway pre-filter ----------------------------------
FILTER_PATHWAY <- TRUE
PATHWAY_FILE   <- "config/WntSignalingPathway.txt"
```

# 2. Setup

```{r setup-environment}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library("tidyverse")
  library("readxl")
  library("writexl")
  library("VennDiagram")
  library("UpSetR")
  library("grid")
})

source("scripts/utils/gene_set_operations.R")

output_dir <- file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, ANALYSIS_NAME)
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

# 3. Optional pathway filter

If a pathway file is provided, the per-comparison gene lists will be
intersected with this gene universe before overlap analysis (use this to ask
e.g. "which WNT genes are DE in both contrasts?").

```{r pathway-load}
if (FILTER_PATHWAY && file.exists(PATHWAY_FILE)) {
  pathway_genes <- load_pathway_genes(PATHWAY_FILE)
} else {
  pathway_genes <- NULL
  message("No pathway pre-filter applied.")
}
```

# 4. Build gene lists

```{r build-gene-lists}
if (USE_MULTIPLE_COMPARISONS) {

  gene_lists <- load_de_gene_lists(
    results_files   = COMPARISON_RESULTS,
    lfc_threshold   = LFC_THRESHOLD,
    padj_threshold  = PADJ_THRESHOLD,
    direction       = DIRECTION,
    gene_filter     = pathway_genes
  )

} else if (USE_SINGLE_RESULT) {

  res <- as.data.frame(read_excel(SINGLE_RESULT_FILE))
  gene_lists <- list()

  if (DIRECTION %in% c("up", "both")) {
    gene_lists$High_Up <- res$Row.names[
      !is.na(res$log2FoldChange) & !is.na(res$padj) &
      res$log2FoldChange > 2 & res$padj < PADJ_THRESHOLD
    ]
    gene_lists$Moderate_Up <- res$Row.names[
      !is.na(res$log2FoldChange) & !is.na(res$padj) &
      res$log2FoldChange > 1 & res$log2FoldChange <= 2 &
      res$padj < PADJ_THRESHOLD
    ]
  }
  if (DIRECTION %in% c("down", "both")) {
    gene_lists$High_Down <- res$Row.names[
      !is.na(res$log2FoldChange) & !is.na(res$padj) &
      res$log2FoldChange < -2 & res$padj < PADJ_THRESHOLD
    ]
    gene_lists$Moderate_Down <- res$Row.names[
      !is.na(res$log2FoldChange) & !is.na(res$padj) &
      res$log2FoldChange < -1 & res$log2FoldChange >= -2 &
      res$padj < PADJ_THRESHOLD
    ]
  }

  if (!is.null(pathway_genes)) {
    gene_lists <- lapply(gene_lists, function(x) intersect(x, pathway_genes))
  }

  for (name in names(gene_lists)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-20s: %d genes\n", name, length(gene_lists[[name]])))
  }

} else {
  stop("Set exactly one of USE_MULTIPLE_COMPARISONS / USE_SINGLE_RESULT to TRUE")
}
```

# 5. UpSet plot

UpSet plots scale better than Venn diagrams beyond 4 sets â€” the bar chart
shows the size of every intersection, sorted by frequency.

```{r upset}
generate_upset_plot(
  gene_lists    = gene_lists,
  output_file   = file.path(output_dir, "UpSet_gene_overlaps.pdf"),
  title         = "Gene Set Overlaps",
  n_intersects  = 20,
  width = 12, height = 7
)
```

# 6. Venn diagram (2â€“4 lists only)

Skipped automatically for >4 lists â€” use the UpSet plot above for those.

```{r venn}
if (length(gene_lists) >= 2 && length(gene_lists) <= 4) {
  generate_venn_diagram(
    gene_lists  = gene_lists,
    output_file = file.path(output_dir, "Venn_gene_overlaps.pdf"),
    title       = "Gene Set Overlaps",
    width = 10, height = 10
  )
} else {
  message("Skipping Venn diagram (need 2â€“4 gene lists; have ", length(gene_lists), ")")
}
```

# 7. Overlaps + export

`export_gene_lists()` writes one Excel workbook with one sheet per input list,
plus sheets for the all-way overlap and every pairwise overlap. `summarize_overlaps()`
produces a top-level summary table.

```{r overlaps}
universal_genes <- find_overlap_genes(gene_lists, pattern = "all")

export_gene_lists(
  gene_lists       = gene_lists,
  output_file      = file.path(output_dir, "gene_lists_with_overlaps.xlsx"),
  include_overlaps = TRUE
)

summary_table <- summarize_overlaps(gene_lists)
write_xlsx(summary_table, file.path(output_dir, "gene_list_summary.xlsx"))
summary_table
```

# 8. Quick peek at universal genes

```{r universal-preview}
if (length(universal_genes) > 0) {
  cat("Universal genes (in ALL lists):", length(universal_genes), "\n")
  cat("First 20:", paste(head(universal_genes, 20), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  if (length(universal_genes) > 20) {
    cat("... and", length(universal_genes) - 20, "more (see Excel for full list)\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("No genes shared across all input lists.\n")
}
```
